title: Role Swap Asuka and Misato
wikitext:
[]: Role Swap: Asuka and Misato             Quote Post by OneShotPunch » Wed Jan 08, 2025 12:29 am It's a question that's been on my mind for a while, especially after I read a tumblr post discussing their nature as foils. I wonder how the story would play out if Asuka was the Operations Director/Guardian figure while Misato was Unit 02's pilot? I guess to to create a more concrete scenario, Kyoko managed to save Asuka during Second Impact but went insane from seeing Adam and hung herself believing her and the doll would die together leaving Asuka scarred, while Misato's father sacrificed himself in an Eva accident that left Misato haunted and equating her worth with sex. How different would the plot go? How do you see their dynamics with Shinji, Ritsuko or Kaji for example?

[]: Re: Role Swap: Asuka and Misato             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Fri Jan 10, 2025 9:39 am How would that work exactly? Would Misato be a teen and Asuka an adult? If so, I think that would change everything. Asuka would probably be more mature and responsible with her emotions, while Misato would be the opposite. If they all kept living together, I imagine their house would be less messy. I can see Asuka being less laid back and more strict with the pilots. At the same time, she probably wouldn't have Misato's strategic vision, so expect actual missions to be more about brawn than brains. I can also see Asuka and Kaji having a thing, as well as Shinji and Misato nurturing feelings for each other (as weird as all of that sounds). Anyway, without Misato to guide Shinji and Asuka to push him to the limit, it's hard to say what would happen, especially in EOE.

[]: Re: Role Swap: Asuka and Misato             Quote Post by OneShotPunch » Fri Jan 10, 2025 10:29 am BernardoCairo wrote: How would that work exactly? Would Misato be a teen and Asuka an adult?

[]: Re: Role Swap: Asuka and Misato             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Fri Jan 10, 2025 12:15 pm Relax, it was a good idea. What did you think about it?

[]: Re: Role Swap: Asuka and Misato             Quote Post by OneShotPunch » Fri Jan 10, 2025 3:21 pm I like it, in particular I wanna zone in on this part: BernardoCairo wrote: I can see Asuka being less laid back and more strict with the pilots.

[]: Re: Role Swap: Asuka and Misato             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat Jan 11, 2025 10:13 am That's interesting. I can totally see Asuka being harsh with Shinji and scolding him for the kiss in particular (if she ever found out about it, of course). Maybe this would have helped make Shinji a better person. It would all depend on how she approached the situation. Humiliation would not be the way to go. Actually, now that I think about it, Shinji probably would have been a better pilot under her command in general. She would probably push him to his limits. OneShotPunch wrote: Teen!Misato is where I see things being more unpredictable.

[]: Re: Role Swap: Asuka and Misato             Quote Post by OneShotPunch » Sun Jan 12, 2025 2:04 am BernardoCairo wrote: Maybe this would have helped make Shinji a better person. It would all depend on how she approached the situation. Humiliation would not be the way to go.

[]: Re: Role Swap: Asuka and Misato             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Jan 12, 2025 2:49 pm I take it we're not swapping their personalities, just their ages and positions, or there would be absolutely no difference. Anyway, Shinji wouldn't have to kiss teenage Misato in her sleep; she would drag him into bed and keep him there for a week like adult Misato did with Kaji. She would not drop subtle hints like teen Asuka for Shinji to miss. Responsible adult Asuka would have to scold both of them. Misato would just brush off the scolding.

[]: Re: Role Swap: Asuka and Misato             Quote Post by Bobby12bro » Tue Jan 14, 2025 10:05 pm I could see things going a lot different, like I don't think Asuka could/would want to work for Nerv. Therefor she wouldn't be the one going to get Shinji, which mean a different pedo would have to take the job. Or even Rei??? I don't know I'm just trying to have fun here. It'd certainly make for a good What If Machine episode of Eva.

I guess to to create a more concrete scenario, Kyoko managed to save Asuka during Second Impact
